news.title:
GAIL approves Rs 3800 crore investment in 700 MW solar projects in UP, Maharashtra.
Renewable capacity to increase from 147 MW to over 1000 MW, supporting net zero goals.
news.summary:
GAIL approves Rs 3800 crore investment in 700 MW solar projects in UP, Maharashtra.
Renewable capacity to increase from 147 MW to over 1000 MW, supporting net zero goals.

news.title:
GAIL to set up a 600 MW solar project with 550 MWh BESS in Uttar Pradesh.
Total project cost is INR 3294.9 Cr, financed via debt and equity; completion in 15 months.
news.summary:
GAIL to set up a 600 MW solar project with 550 MWh BESS in Uttar Pradesh.
Total project cost is INR 3294.9 Cr, financed via debt and equity; completion in 15 months.

news.title:
Gail's Kochi-Bengaluru-Mangaluru pipeline completion extended to Sep 2026.
Pipeline spans 1,104 km; 919 km laid, 657 km commissioned, delays due to work hindrances.
news.summary:
Gail's Kochi-Bengaluru-Mangaluru pipeline completion extended to Sep 2026.
Pipeline spans 1,104 km; 919 km laid, 657 km commissioned, delays due to work hindrances.

news.title:
Experts recommend holding Ather Energy, HDFC Bank; buying Vikram Solar, Balu Forge in staggered manner.
Rapid fire: Sell GAIL, Info Edge; Buy UNO Minda, Sona BLW; Hold Asian Paints, HAL, Tata Chemicals.

news.title:
West Asia tensions caused gas stocks like Petronet, GAIL to fall up to 5%.
Experts warn weak Q4FY26 for oil & gas firms due to supply disruptions, rupee depreciation.
news.summary:
West Asia tensions caused gas stocks like Petronet, GAIL to fall up to 5%.
Experts warn weak Q4FY26 for oil & gas firms due to supply disruptions, rupee depreciation.

news.title:
Gail (India) Ltd issued bonds worth ₹1,575 Cr for FY ending Mar 2026.
Interest payment of ₹115.6 Cr made on time; rated AAA Stable by India Ratings & CARE.
news.summary:
Gail (India) Ltd issued bonds worth ₹1,575 Cr for FY ending Mar 2026.
Interest payment of ₹115.6 Cr made on time; rated AAA Stable by India Ratings & CARE.

news.title:
GAIL plans to borrow ₹5,000-₹6,000 cr in FY27 to fund expansion.
Dabhol terminal operates at 2.25M tpy due to global LNG supply constraints.
news.summary:
GAIL plans to borrow ₹5,000-₹6,000 cr in FY27 to fund expansion.
Dabhol terminal operates at 2.25M tpy due to global LNG supply constraints.

news.title:
GAIL India's Ratnagiri LNG terminal to operate at 2.25 MTPA out of 5 MTPA capacity.
Moderate utilization of Ratnagiri LNG terminal expected, per co-executive statement.
news.summary:
GAIL India's Ratnagiri LNG terminal to operate at 2.25 MTPA out of 5 MTPA capacity.
Moderate utilization of Ratnagiri LNG terminal expected, per co-executive statement.

news.title:
GAIL India procured 3 spot LNG cargoes for near-term supply needs.
Executive highlights active LNG procurement strategy by GAIL India.
news.summary:
GAIL India procured 3 spot LNG cargoes for near-term supply needs.

news.title:
GAIL India plans to raise funds locally due to rising dollar borrowing costs.
Co-executive highlights caution over increased expense of dollar borrowings.
news.summary:
GAIL India plans to raise funds locally due to rising dollar borrowing costs.

news.title:
Brokerages highlight stock picks like BPCL, GAIL, Tata Steel, SBI Life, and Ambuja Cement across energy, cement, and insurance sectors.
Analysts favor 360One, Nuvama Wealth, Max Healthcare, and domestic cyclicals, citing resilience, market recovery potential, and strategic positioning.
news.summary:
Brokerages highlight stock picks like BPCL, GAIL, Tata Steel, SBI Life, and Ambuja Cement across energy, cement, and insurance sectors.
Analysts favor 360One, Nuvama Wealth, Max Healthcare, and domestic cyclicals, citing resilience, market recovery potential, and strategic positioning.

news.title:
GAIL India plans to borrow ₹50-60B in FY27, targeting local markets.
Raising debt in dollars deemed expensive; focus remains on rupee funding.
news.summary:
GAIL India plans to borrow ₹50-60B in FY27, targeting local markets.
Raising debt in dollars deemed expensive; focus remains on rupee funding.

news.title:
Experts discussed buy, sell, or hold recommendations for stocks like IOC, IndiGo, GE Shipping, Gail, and more on NDTV Profit.
IOC and Gail were advised as long-term holds; IndiGo faced resistance near Rs 4,900-5,000, and MTAR as 'wait and watch.'
news.summary:
Experts discussed buy, sell, or hold recommendations for stocks like IOC, IndiGo, GE Shipping, Gail, and more on NDTV Profit.
IOC and Gail were advised as long-term holds; IndiGo faced resistance near Rs 4,900-5,000, and MTAR as 'wait and watch.'

news.title:
GAIL shares jumped 7.6%, hitting ₹156.5 on NSE, after US-Iran ceasefire news.
GAIL rebounded 16% from 52-week low but remains 23% below 52-week high of ₹202.79.
news.summary:
GAIL shares jumped 7.6%, hitting ₹156.5 on NSE, after US-Iran ceasefire news.
GAIL rebounded 16% from 52-week low but remains 23% below 52-week high of ₹202.79.

news.title:
Asian markets surged up to 5% after a 15-day ceasefire between Iran and the US; Gift Nifty jumped 700 points.
Infosys, GAIL, and Aurobindo Pharma among stocks in focus; oil prices plunged ~14% amid eased geopolitical risks.
news.summary:
Asian markets surged up to 5% after a 15-day ceasefire between Iran and the US; Gift Nifty jumped 700 points.
Infosys, GAIL, and Aurobindo Pharma among stocks in focus; oil prices plunged ~14% amid eased geopolitical risks.

news.title:
GAIL surged after signing a long-term charter agreement with Alpha Gas' affiliate.
Q3 FY26 saw GAIL's net profit drop 19.5% to Rs 1,602.6 cr; sales fell 2.5%.
news.summary:
GAIL surged after signing a long-term charter agreement with Alpha Gas' affiliate.
Q3 FY26 saw GAIL's net profit drop 19.5% to Rs 1,602.6 cr; sales fell 2.5%.

news.title:
Infosys partners with Harness for AI-led software delivery; GAIL signs LNG carrier deal with Alpha Gas.
SRF faces ₹327.4 cr tax demand; Muthoot Finance sets FY26 interim dividend record date as Apr 13, 2026.
news.summary:
Infosys partners with Harness for AI-led software delivery; GAIL signs LNG carrier deal with Alpha Gas.
SRF faces ₹327.4 cr tax demand; Muthoot Finance sets FY26 interim dividend record date as Apr 13, 2026.

news.title: GAIL signed a long-term charter party agreement with AlphaGas for an LNG carrier.
news.summary: GAIL signed a long-term charter party agreement with AlphaGas for an LNG carrier.

news.title:
GAIL signs long-term LNG ship charter deal with Alpha Gas for 174,000 CBM.
The deal aims to strengthen India's LNG supply chain under Maritime Amrit Kaal Vision 2047.
news.summary:
GAIL signs long-term LNG ship charter deal with Alpha Gas for 174,000 CBM.
The deal aims to strengthen India's LNG supply chain under Maritime Amrit Kaal Vision 2047.

news.title:
Oracle Financial Services and HAL are recommended as holds and buys, respectively, with positive long-term outlooks.
ONGC receives a sell call due to market risks, while Gail is attractive at current levels with a target of Rs 160-165.
news.summary:
Oracle Financial Services and HAL are recommended as holds and buys, respectively, with positive long-term outlooks.
